title: Purely Silky Algerian Lamb Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful Algerian dish featuring lamb, herbal notes, and a silky texture, perfect for a date night, this high protein friendly recipe combines the sweetness of dates with the savory taste of lamb, ketchup, and dashi extract.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the ketchup, dashi extract, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the pitted dates and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours.
Remove the lid and simmer for an additional 30 minutes, or until the lamb is tender and the sauce has thickened.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
